fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the routing number.
The system copied the number from the Routing No. field in the Routing Line.
The system uses this field internally.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the operation to which the entry refers.
This field is filled in by the system.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the quality measure.

fields.name: Min. Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies a minimum value, which is to be reached in the quality control.

fields.name: Max. Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum value, which may be reached in the quality control.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the operation number that the comment refers to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the status of the production order that this quality measure is related to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the production order number that the quality measure is related to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Routing Reference No.
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

Refers to the routing number that is related to the production order line that uses the routing quality measure.
The field contains a zero when the routing line is related to a family order where more production order lines share the same routing.
